title: Places
description: Places make drives readable — instead of coordinates, Tripatlas shows "Home → Customer Müller".

empty.title: No places yet.
empty.hint: Add places so drives show readable names instead of coordinates.

form.name: Name
form.searchAddressHint: Searches via OpenStreetMap (Nominatim). Selecting a result sets the position and address below.
form.mapHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the position. Map data ©
form.electricityPriceHint: For automatic charging costs at this place — e.g. Home 0.32 €/kWh.

delete.confirmWithUsage: Really delete place "{name}"? It is used {count} times — the assignments will be reset to "unknown" and all drives/charging sessions/parks will be re-matched.

errors.priceMustBePositive: Electricity price must be greater than 0.
errors.currencyRequired: Please provide a currency when an electricity price is set.
